meaning.vi: giao phó, nhờ cậy, nhắn gửi
commission, entrusting with (work), part-time employee, temporary work
meaning.en: commission, entrusting with work, part-time employee, temporary work

meaning.vi: having great hopes for (someone's future), expecting much of, pinning one's hopes on
meaning.en: having high hopes for someone's future, expecting much of, pinning one's hopes on

meaning.vi: commissioning, entrusting (with), request, appointment (to a position)
meaning.en: commissioning, entrusting with, request, appointment to a position
dying wish (to be carried out after one's death)

meaning.vi: to entrust (someone) with, to pin one's hopes on (someone's future), to have great expectations for, to have (someone) deliver (a letter, etc.), to leave (a message), to send word
meaning.en: to entrust someone with, to pin one's hopes on someone's future, to have great expectations for, to have someone deliver (a letter, etc.), to leave a message, to send word

mnemonic_vi: Miệng 口 nhắn gửi, dặn dò và giao phó việc cho người khác, đó là 嘱.
